text:
Team USA men's basketball reportedly finalized its 12-player roster for the upcoming 2024 Olympics in Paris on Tuesday.

The Athletic'sShams Charania and Joe Vardonreported, citing sources, thatLos Angeles Clippersforward Kawhi Leonard accepted the team's final roster spot on Tuesday.

Here's the full list:

Team USA has selected its 12-player roster for the 2024 Paris Olympics, sources tell me and@joevardon:LeBron JamesStephen CurryKevin DurantJoel EmbiidJayson TatumKawhi LeonardDevin BookerJrue HolidayAnthony DavisAnthony EdwardsBam AdebayoTyrese Haliburton

The roster features Olympic veterans in three-time gold medalist Kevin Durant, two-time gold medalist LeBron James and one-time gold medalists Jayson Tatum, Devin Booker, Jrue Holiday, Anthony Davis and Bam Adebayo.

Golden State Warriorsstar Steph Curry, who has played for Team USA in two World Cup competitions, will play in his first Olympics. The 2024 games will also mark the first Olympic appearance for Leonard, Joel Embiid, Anthony Edwards and Tyrese Haliburton.

Team USA will be led once again by Warriors coach Steve Kerr, who plans to step down from his role with the national team after the Olympics.

Team USA is eyeing its fifth straight gold medal in men's basketball. The Americans defeated France 87â82 to win gold at the 2020 Toyko Games.

title: Team USA Men's Basketball Selects 12-Player Roster for 2024 Paris Olympics, per Report
description: Team USA's all-time leading scorer Kevin Durant will chase down his fourth career gold medal with this roster.
